title: Just Fun Grenades
description: I like just having fun, and what's more fun then grenades. So that's what this mod does, it adds grenades... and pineapples
body:
this is funny

![Me getting blown up by a Grenade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447c88307bb5452be748daf3e0e7a8fb33ee5983.gif)
# Description
this is a funny mod that adds various types of grenades like blue ones or diamond ones or blind ones or stinky ones but yeah alot of grenades

this mod is really fun to play around with or challenge your friends to grenade battles or something fun like that 

and of course you can craft and obtain all of them in survival note that not all of them are just crafting the grenade with something but that is the majority of them

you can obviously throw them and they all do different things or you can just let it explode too I don't know why you would do that but you can and it makes a funny cartoon style onomatopoeia BOOM 

I like it I hope other people do too



also it adds pineapples because why not
